summary: Phase 2 Paneltec Civil — backend + frontend end-to-end testing. 18/18 backend pytest cases pass (auth, dashboard, openapi, CRUD for all 6 entities incl. soft-delete, SWMS review RBAC, and all 3 Claude AI endpoints). Frontend Playwright verified login -> dashboard with real JWT token in localStorage, dashboard metric chips show real backend counts (SWMS 8 / Pre-starts 12 / Diary 10 / Hazards 6 / Incidents 4 / Inspections 6), all six list pages render seeded records, SWMS AI wizard reaches step 2 with Claude-generated tasks (6) + hazards (6) + PPE, sign-out clears paneltec_token/paneltec_user and redirects to /login, and unauth visit to /app/dashboard redirects to /login. Zero console errors on the tested routes.

minor.issue: Response key is 'attention_band' instead of the spec-named 'band'. Frontend appears to handle this already but the published spec/PRD says 'band'. Either rename the key or update docs.
Form field name is 'file' (FastAPI default) — spec says 'multipart image'. Either accept both 'file' and 'image' or document the actual field name.

action_items: Decide on consistent naming for dashboard 'band' vs 'attention_band'.
(Optional) Address Phase 1 Radix DialogTitle a11y warning if not already done.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/dashboard/metrics returns 'attention_band' while review spec and prior PRD use 'band'. Small inconsistency — pick one.
All entity CRUD properly soft-deletes (subsequent GET returns 404) — good.
RBAC on POST /api/swms/{id}/review is correctly enforced (worker -> 403, hseq_lead -> 200, status transitions to 'approved').

AI endpoints return JSON with all expected keys (tasks/hazards/controls/ppe; activities/delays/deliveries/visitors/weather/safety_observations; identified_hazards/suggested_controls/severity/summary/photo_url).

Inspections create requires both 'template_name' and 'date' fields in addition to template/title/items — payload contract is heavier than spec implies; consider documenting required fields explicitly in OpenAPI.
test_credentials: demo@paneltec.com / demo123 (hseq_lead); worker@paneltec.com / demo123; admin@paneltec.com / demo123
seed_data_creation: None — relied on idempotent backend seed_all() (users=5, workspaces=2, swms=8, pre_starts=12, site_diary=10, hazards=6, incidents=4, inspections=6). All TEST_-prefixed records created during CRUD tests are deleted at the end of each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_paneltec_backend.py (pytest, 18 cases, runs in <30s). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Sign-out testid is 'sign-out' inside the avatar dropdown (open by clicking the 'DH' avatar button top-right). User-menu does not currently expose a data-testid='user-menu' attribute — recommend adding one in AppShell.jsx for future Playwright stability. SWMS AI wizard sometimes takes up to 60s on cold start; budget cap on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY can cause sporadic 503s — retry-once handling already documented in spec.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. Two minor backend naming inconsistencies (attention_band vs band, hazard-vision field 'file' vs 'image') do not break the frontend, which is already consistent with the actual backend contract.
